title: cyperus cremeomariscus
intro: Cyperus cremeomariscus, also known as the creme-mariscus sedge or umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Cyperus cremeomariscus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are typically used to make teas, infusions, and other remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
